64605.「……材料さえ 取ってきてくれれば\n 薬を作れて この人が治るかもしれないのよ:
If you could just get me the ingredients to
make some medicine, then I just be able to
cure him!

64606.「そんなこと言って オレたちを\n 危険な目に遭わせようとしてんじゃないのか？:
Oi, lass! Yer not tryin' ta put us in
danger by yappin' that, are ya?

64607.「その薬で治る保証が どこにあるのよ！？\n アンタの言うことなんか\n 信じら:
How do we know for sure that your medicine
will cure him? You think we'll just believe
what you say?!

64609.「この人 助けたくないの？\n 仲間が 死んじゃってもいいの！？:
Don't you want to help him? You'd rather
just watch him die?!

64610.「でも アンタのことは 信じられない！\n ベルムド王に さんざん たてついて…:
But how do you expect us to trust YOU?!
You constantly went against King Bermud...
It's YOUR fault he's dead!

64612.「ちょうど よかった！ 今 困ってたの。\n 最近 城下町で 寒い寒いって 身体:
Just the person I needed! I'm in a bit of a bind...you see, there's a illness going around that makes people feel like they're
really cold, and they can't stop shivering...

64613.「それで 病気について 調べてみたら\n このまま 放っておくと 凍死してしまう:
So I did some research on it...and I found out
it's deadly. If it's not treated, those who
have it will end up freezing to death.

64614.「治すには 特別な薬が必要なんだけど\n ローヌにんじんと サリュウコツって\n:
I'll need a special medicine to cure it, but
I'm missing some ingredients... I need a
Rhone Carrot and a Sand Bone.

64615.「私は ここで 薬を作る準備を\n しなきゃならないから <pc>さんに\n 材:
Do you think you help me gather those
ingredients while I stay here to prepare
the medicine?

64616.「この人たちに 集めてきてもらうように\n お願いしてたんだけど 断られちゃって:
I've trying asking them to help me, but they
said no, so... Can you help?

64617.「ホント？ ありがとう！ ローヌにんじんは\n こっちの世界の ローヌ樹林帯の\:
You will? Thanks! They say Rhone Carrots
grow in the Rhone Woodlands, far to the
south.

64618.「サリュウコツは こっちの世界の\n アラハギーロ地方の 東の砂漠にいる\n <:
And it looks like you can find Sand Bones
by defeating Dragon Zombies in the desert
to the east.

64619.「私 ここで 調合の準備をして 待ってるね。:
I'll stay here and start preparing the
medicine.

64620.「おいおい なに 勝手に話進めてんだよ！\n 早く こっから出てってくれ！:
'Ey, now! What are ya talkin' about? You
and dis bloke should get out o' here!

64621.「私…… この人を治すまで\n 絶対 ここを出ていかないわ。\n そう決めたの！:
I'm...I'm not leaving until I cure that man!
And that's final!

64622.「じゃあ ローヌにんじんと\n サリュウコツを 集めたら\n ここへ戻ってきてね:
Come back here after you've collected the
ingredients for me, okay?

64623.「ホント！？ あっ でも……\n <pc>さん 他の人からの頼まれごとも\n い:
You will?! Oh, but...it looks like you've got
your hands full helping others right now.

64624.「じゃあ 今は頼めないね。\n 仕方ないから ダメもとで もう１回\n あの人た:
I couldn't ask you to do that for me now...
I guess I have no choice. I'll try one more
time to ask them to help me!

64625.「そっか……。仕方ないね。\n <pc>さんになら お願いできると\n 思ってた:
I see... Oh, well...
I was really hoping you'd help me.

64626.「それじゃあ 私 ダメもとで もう１回\n あの人たちに 頼んでみるわ！:
I guess I have no choice. I'll try one more
time to ask them to help me!

64627.「……あなたたちが この材料さえ\n 集めてきてくれれば 薬が作れて\n この人:
If you could just gather some ingredients
for me, then I could make some medicine
that may actually cure him!

64628.「お前の言うことなんか 信用できっか！:
How could I possibly believe anything you
say?!

64631.「最近 城下町で 寒い寒いって\n 震えている人がいるから いろいろ調べて\n:
Lately there have been some people in town
that can't stop shivering, so I looked into it
and found a medicine that can cure it.

64632.「でも その薬を作るのには\n ローヌにんじんと サリュウコツって\n 材料が:
But to make it, I'll need a Rhone Carrot
and a Sand Bone...

64633.「私は ここで 薬を作る準備を\n しなきゃならないから <pc>さんに\n 材:
Do you think you help me gather those
ingredients while I stay here to prepare
the medicine?

64634.「この人たちに 集めてきてもらうように\n お願いしてたんだけど 断られちゃって:
I've trying asking them to help me, but they
said no, so... Can you help?

64636.「ローヌにんじんは こっちの世界の\n ローヌ樹林帯の 南の果てに\n 生えてる:
They say Rhone Carrots grow in the southern
part of the Rhone Woodlands.

64637.「サリュウコツは こっちの世界の\n アラハギーロ地方の 東の砂漠にいる\n <:
And it looks like you can find Sand Bones
by defeating Dragon Zombies in the desert
to the east.

64638.「おい セラフィ！\n 人の家で 勝手なマネしてんじゃねぇよ！:
'Ey, Seraphi! Don't think ya can just do
whatever ya want in 'ere!

64639.「私は ここで 薬の調合の準備をして\n 待ってるから よろしくね！:
I'll wait here for you while I prepare
the medicine. Good luck!

64640.「シメールが大変なときに なに 悠長に\n 本なんか 読んでんだ！？\n いいか:
What d'ya think yer doin' readin' some
book when Shimere needs help?! Get outta
here right now or I'll MAKE ya get out!

64641.「そろそろ <pc>さんが\n 帰ってくるはずだから\n 薬を調合する手順を 確:
<pc> should be back soon.
I'm just going over how to mix the
medicine together!

64643.「お願いした ローヌにんじんと\n サリュウコツを 集めてきてくれたのね。\n:
I see you were able to find those ingredients.
I'm all ready to start.

64644.「じゃあ さっそくだけど 薬を作って\n あの人に 飲ませてあげたいから\n 材:
Let's get right to it, then. I'm going to
start mixing, so can I have those ingredients?
<yesno><close>

64645.「そんな…… 材料がないと 薬が作れないよ。\n どうしよう……。:
But...I can't make the medicine without
them...

64646.「ねえ <pc>さん 意地悪しないで……。\n 薬の材料 もらってもいいかな？<:
Please don't be mean...
Can you please give me those ingredients?<yesno><close>

64647.<pc>は セラフィに\nローヌにんじんと サリュウコツを\n渡した。:
<pc> gives Seraphi the
Rhone Carrot and the Sand Bone.

64648.「ありがとう！ これがあれば\n 薬を作って 病気の人たちを助けられるよ！:
Thanks! This medicine is sure to help all
those sick people!

64649.セラフィは 薬を調合して\nシメールに飲ませた。:
Seraphi mixes some medicine, and
gives some to Shimere.

64651.「……ん？ あんなに寒かったのに\n もう 寒くない…… オレ 治ったのか？:
...Huh? I was feeling so cold, but now I
feel just fine... Am I cured?

64652.「薬が 効いたみたいね。もう 大丈夫！:
Looks like the medicine worked!
You're all right now!

64653.「まったく 心配かけやがって！！: Ya really had me worried there!

64654.「<pc>さん 私ね……\n こうやって この国の人たちを守りたかったの。\n:
You know... This is exactly how I wanted to
help protect everyone living here.
That's why I studied so hard...

64655.「だって この国の真実を知っているのは\n 私だけだから……。: Since I'm the only one who knows the truth...

64656.「<pc>さん 協力してくれてありがとう。\n いつも 助けてもらってるね。\n:
Thanks, <pc>! You're always such a
big help. I have a little something for you
I wanna give... Here!

64657.「……ねえ シメールさん。\n なぜ この病気にかかったか 心当たりある？\n:
Say, Mr. Shimere... Do you have any idea at
all how you got sick? Since when did you
start feeling cold?

64658.「そうだっ アイツだ！\n あのバッファロンを 見たときからだ！！:
Yes, it was that monster!
It was as soon as I saw that Buffalogre!

64660.「格闘場のショーで 最初に ベルムド王が\n ズッタズタにした あのバッファロン:
You know, the one that King Bermud first
defeated in the arena! THAT Buffalogre!

64661.「夜中に ベルムドォォォ……って\n 低くうなる声がして 外に出てみたら\n ヤ:
It was the middle of the night... I heard a growling voice say "Beeeermuuuud..." So I went outside to check, and that's when it attacked
me!

64662.「ところが そのまま オレの身体を通りぬけて\n 消えてっちゃってさ。\n あり:
But when it did, it just passed right through
me and vanished into thin air...
I guess it wasn't really alive.

64663.「怨霊だ…… 怨霊になって\n この町に 戻ってきたんだっ！！:
It's a vengeful spirit...and it's come back
here for its revenge!

64664.「そうだよ。アイツに襲われたときから 急に\n 猛烈な寒気が襲ってきて 身体が思:
And ever since it attacked me, I've had
those awful chills, and I've barely been
able to move...

64665.「……やっぱり この病気は\n 怨霊が振りまいた 呪いなのね。:
...So this illness really must have been some
kind of curse from that spirit.

64666.「ねぇ <pc>さん。最初のショーで\n 殺されたバッファロンって 元は人間だよ:
Say, <pc>... That Buffalogre used to
be a human, right? Just who were they?

64667.「うーん……。気になるけど \n 今は 病気にかかってる人たちに\n この薬を飲:
Hmm... I am curious about it, but...right now
I'm going to focus on giving this medicine
to everyone who needs it.

64668.「じゃ <pc>さん！ 私は もう行くね。\n 本当に 助かったよ！:
I'll be off, then! Thanks so much for your
help!
